case_title: RIMMA BOROKHOV VS. FREEDOM WEST HOMES et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY BOROKHOV, RIMMA AS TO DEFENDANT FREEDOM WEST HOMES BROWN, RAYMOND S. HUTTON, BILLY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-20-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $20.00) SERVED MAY-08-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, RAYMOND S.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-20-2008 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT FREEDOM WEST HOMES
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE 20.00) SERVED MAY-08-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT FREEDOM WEST HOMES
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $20.00) SERVED MAY-08-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HUTTON, BILLY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-20-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-20-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT.DEFENDANT FREEDOM WEST HOMES ARE PRESENT AND WAIVES SERVICE. DEFENDANTS RAYMOND BROWN AND BILLY HUTTON NOT PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO BILLY HUTTON, AND RAYMOND S. BROWN BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF JUN-20-2008 AT 1:30PM.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT FREEDOM WEST HOMES

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOROKHOV, RIMMA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FREEDOM WEST HOMES $750.00 PRINCIPAL, $135.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $885.00, DEFENDANT FREEDOM WEST HOMES SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR ANY PRIOR PAYMENT TO PLAINTIFF PURSUANT TO THE BOARD'S PREVIOUS RECOMMENDATION. DEFENDANT'S BROWN AND HUTTON, AS INDIVIDUALS, DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
